summary: Esports tournament platform (Empire Esports) being built on Internet Computer/Caffeine platform. Features include admin dashboard, player registration with 2-step flow (details + Internet Identity authentication), and tournament management. Currently working on removing OTP verification from registration and replacing with Internet Identity login.
architectural_notes: Platform: Internet Computer / Caffeine (deployed at spiritual-copper-dg0-draft.caffeine.xyz)
Authentication: Internet Identity (passkey/Google/Apple) used for player login/registration
Player registration flow: 2-step — (1) Enter Display Name, Mobile No, BGMI Player ID; (2) Internet Identity authentication
known_issues: Error: 'Unauthorized: Only authenticated users can register as a player' — caused by missing proper Internet Identity auth flow

existing_features.title: Refactor the RegisterPage to a 2-step flow: Step 1 collects Display Name, Mobile Number, and BGMI Player ID with a Continue button; Step 2 shows an Internet Identity authentication prompt (using the existing useInternetIdentity hook) instead of OTP verification. Remove the entire OTP step (Step 2 'Verify OTP'), including the OTP input field, 'Demo OTP: 1234' banner, and all OTP generation/verification logic. The stepper UI should update to show only 2 steps: 'Details' and 'Done'.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove OTP verification from player registration and replace with Internet Identity authentication as Step 2 after entering Display Name, Mobile Number, and BGMI Player ID

Update the backend registerPlayer function (or its authorization check in main.mo) to accept calls from Internet Identity-authenticated principals. Ensure that when a player registers after authenticating via Internet Identity, the caller's principal is treated as authenticated and registration succeeds without returning an 'Unauthorized' error.
